caption: A news broadcast features two men in a split-screen format. On the left, a man wearing a red cap and a floral patterned shirt speaks, appearing to be in a close-up shot. On the right, another man wearing a red cap and a grey traditional garment is shown in a medium shot, standing with his hands held together in front of him. The background for the man on the left is a plain, neutral wall, while the man on the right is in a brighter setting with a white wall and a hint of greenery. The "plustv" logo appears in the top left corners. Across the bottom of the screen, a banner displays "PLUS POLITICS" and the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, channel information reads "WATCH ON DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308", with a website address "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" visible at the very bottom. The man on the left continues speaking throughout the sequence.
